system.description: This potion will drive the drinker into a barely contained bloodthirsty rage. They gain +2 to hit and damage on all melee attacks, as well as 3d6 bonus Stamina points. Enemies gain a +1 to hit berserkers. The rage lasts for 1d6+6 combat rounds. If no enemies remain standing, the berserker must roll INT 8+ to avoid attacking friends.
